title: Hatchways
description: Adds simple Hatchways you can go through.
body:
Hatchways adds simple Hatchways that you can go through by opening them.

---
**-You can open a hatchway by right-clicking.**
![Open and shut barrels](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86d194cd96a445d93fca3d8fc42ed3fd01598dea.png)
**-When a hatchway is opened it isn't solid any more letting you go through.**
![In a Barrel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1129c4717bb00f9ecaa21ae5833d7c349950360f.png)

**-Hatchways can be rotated like logs.**
![Barrels rotated](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7efe8cc7356fb314c50cdf144723b61194979aca.png)

**-Hatchways are crafted using 1 Trapdoor and 1 Barrel.**

![The two kinds of Hatchway](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MqXX7ssZ/images/5831af039a06d8ff223e68f4227ceff5c3e4ef12.png)
